name: Blast Radius & Soak Computation
description: Blast radius: BFS/DFS traversal of access graph edges from a changed node, collecting all reachable nodes and their data tiers. Classifies result per rules: PUBLIC-only→AUTO_MERGE, PUBLIC+PII→SOAK, any FINANCIAL/AUTH→HUMAN_GATE, any COMPLIANCE→HUMAN_GATE+legal_flag, unauthorized tier→HUMAN_GATE, LOW_TRUST_AUTHORITATIVE→HUMAN_GATE. Traversal is bounded by visited-set to handle cycles efficiently (rabbit hole patch). Soak computation: soak_duration = base_duration(tier) * (2.0 - trust_score) * max(1.0, sqrt(target_requests / observed_rate_rps)). Monotonic in both trust and volume (FA-A-009, FA-A-010). Fires human gate webhook when HUMAN_GATE triggered.

types.name: DataTier
types.description: Data classification tier with a total severity order. PUBLIC < PII < FINANCIAL < AUTH < COMPLIANCE. Used in blast radius classification to determine action category.

types.name: ActionCategory
types.description: Blast radius action classification with a total severity order. AUTO_MERGE < SOAK < HUMAN_GATE. The final action for a blast result is max over all per-node actions.

types.name: NodeId
types.description: Type-safe node identifier. NewType('NodeId', str). Must be a non-empty string uniquely identifying a node in the access graph.

types.name: Timedelta
types.description: Python datetime.timedelta representing a duration. Used for soak durations and base durations.

types.name: Datetime
types.description: Python datetime.datetime. Must always carry tzinfo=timezone.utc.

types.name: NodeMetadata

fields.name: node_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this node in the access graph.

validators.error_message: node_id must be a non-empty string

fields.name: data_tier
fields.description: The data classification tier of this node.

fields.name: trust_score
fields.description: Raw trust score computed from the trust ledger. Must be in [0.0, 1.0]. Policy calculations use this raw value, never display tiers.

validators.error_message: trust_score must be in [0.0, 1.0], got {value} for node {node_id}

fields.name: authorized_tiers
fields.description: Set of DataTier values this node is authorized to access. If the node's data_tier is not in authorized_tiers, it triggers HUMAN_GATE.

fields.name: is_authoritative
fields.description: Whether this node is authoritative (declared via manifest). Trust is earned, authority is declared — these are distinct concepts.

types.description: Immutable metadata for a single node in the access graph. Frozen Pydantic v2 model.

types.name: AccessGraphEdge

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source node of the directed edge.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Target node of the directed edge.

types.description: A directed edge in the access graph from source to target.

types.name: AccessGraph

fields.name: adjacency
fields.description: Adjacency list: maps each NodeId to the list of NodeIds it can reach via directed edges.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Maps each NodeId to its NodeMetadata. Every node in adjacency keys and values must exist in this dict.

types.description: Mutable access graph with adjacency list and node metadata. Builder pattern — not frozen. Adjacency is a dict mapping NodeId to list of NodeId (neighbors). Metadata is a dict mapping NodeId to NodeMetadata. Invariant: every node referenced in adjacency must have a corresponding metadata entry.

types.name: NodeBlastDetail

fields.name: node_id
fields.description: The node this detail describes.

fields.name: data_tier
fields.description: Data classification tier of this node.

fields.name: trust_score
fields.description: Raw trust score of this node.

fields.name: is_authoritative
fields.description: Whether this node is authoritative.

fields.name: is_authorized_for_tier
fields.description: Whether this node's data_tier is within its authorized_tiers.

fields.name: node_action
fields.description: The action classification for this individual node before max-over-nodes aggregation.

fields.name: depth
fields.description: BFS depth from the origin node. Origin has depth 0.

types.description: Per-node detail within a blast radius result. Frozen Pydantic v2 model.

types.name: TraversalResult

fields.name: origin
fields.description: The starting node for the traversal.

fields.name: reachable_nodes
fields.description: Frozenset of all reachable NodeIds including the origin.

fields.name: node_details
fields.description: Per-node traversal details including metadata and BFS depth.

fields.name: highest_data_tier
fields.description: The maximum DataTier among all reachable nodes by severity order.

fields.name: max_depth_reached
fields.description: The maximum BFS depth reached during traversal.

fields.name: cycle_detected
fields.description: True if the traversal encountered at least one back-edge (cycle) during BFS.

types.description: Result of BFS traversal of the access graph from an origin node. Frozen Pydantic v2 model. Contains all reachable nodes with their metadata and depth.

types.name: ClassificationResult

fields.name: action
fields.description: The aggregated action category (max over all per-node actions).

fields.name: legal_flag
fields.description: True if any reachable node has DataTier.COMPLIANCE and action is HUMAN_GATE.

fields.name: contributing_nodes
fields.description: NodeIds of nodes that contributed to the highest action classification.

types.description: Result of blast radius classification. Frozen Pydantic v2 model. Contains the action category and legal_flag.

types.name: SoakParams

fields.name: base_durations
fields.description: Maps each DataTier to its base soak duration (timedelta). All five DataTier values must have an entry.

fields.name: target_requests
fields.description: Target number of requests that should be observed during soak. Must be positive.

fields.name: observed_rate_rps
fields.description: Observed request rate in requests per second. Must be strictly positive. Floored to epsilon (1e-9) internally to prevent division by zero.

validators.error_message: observed_rate_rps must be strictly positive, got {value}

fields.name: low_trust_threshold
fields.description: Trust score threshold below which an authoritative node triggers HUMAN_GATE (LOW_TRUST_AUTHORITATIVE rule). Must be in [0.0, 1.0].

types.description: Parameters for soak duration computation. Frozen Pydantic v2 model. base_durations maps each DataTier to its base soak timedelta.

types.name: BlastResult

fields.name: origin_node
fields.description: The origin node from which blast radius was computed.

fields.name: reachable_nodes
fields.description: Frozenset of all reachable NodeIds including the origin.

fields.name: highest_data_tier
fields.description: The maximum DataTier among all reachable nodes by severity order.

fields.name: action
fields.description: The final aggregated action category for this blast radius.

fields.name: legal_flag
fields.description: True only when action == HUMAN_GATE and at least one reachable node has DataTier.COMPLIANCE.

fields.name: soak_duration
fields.description: Computed soak duration. Present (positive timedelta) only when action == SOAK. None otherwise.

fields.name: per_node_details
fields.description: Detailed per-node blast radius information.

fields.name: computed_at
fields.description: UTC timestamp of when this result was computed. Must have tzinfo=timezone.utc.

fields.name: cycle_detected
fields.description: Whether cycles were detected during traversal.

fields.name: max_depth_reached
fields.description: Maximum BFS depth reached during traversal.

fields.name: contributing_nodes
fields.description: NodeIds that contributed to the highest action classification.

types.description: Complete blast radius evaluation result. Frozen Pydantic v2 model. Aggregates traversal, classification, and soak computation into a single immutable result.

types.name: HumanGateNotifier

fields.name: notify
fields.description: Protocol method signature: def notify(self, result: BlastResult) -> None. Dispatches a human gate notification webhook for the given blast result.

types.description: Protocol (typing.Protocol) for human gate webhook dispatch. Implementations must define notify(result: BlastResult) -> None. Injectable via dependency injection for testability — tests provide a mock notifier with no network calls.

functions.name: compute_blast_radius
functions.description: Pure BFS traversal of the access graph from an origin node. Collects all reachable nodes with their metadata and BFS depth. Uses a visited-set to handle cycles efficiently (rabbit hole patch). Optionally bounded by max_depth. Returns a TraversalResult with all reachable nodes, per-node details, highest data tier, and cycle detection flag.

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The access graph to traverse. Must have consistent adjacency and metadata.

inputs.name: origin
inputs.description: The starting node for BFS traversal. Must exist in the graph.

inputs.name: max_depth
inputs.description: Optional maximum BFS depth. None means unbounded. If provided, must be >= 0.

error_cases.name: origin_not_found
error_cases.condition: origin does not exist in graph.metadata

error_data.node_id: The NodeId that was not found in the graph

error_cases.name: inconsistent_graph
error_cases.condition: A node referenced in adjacency has no corresponding metadata entry

error_data.referenced_by: The NodeId whose adjacency list references the missing node

error_cases.name: invalid_max_depth
error_cases.condition: max_depth is provided and is negative

preconditions: graph.adjacency and graph.metadata must be consistent: every node in adjacency keys/values must have a metadata entry
If max_depth is provided, it must be >= 0
postconditions: result.origin == origin
origin is in result.reachable_nodes
len(result.reachable_nodes) == len(result.node_details)
All nodes in result.reachable_nodes have corresponding entries in result.node_details
result.highest_data_tier is the maximum DataTier by severity order among all reachable nodes
result.max_depth_reached <= max_depth if max_depth is not None
If cycle_detected is True, at least one back-edge was encountered during BFS

structured_side_effects.description: Pure function — no side effects. BFS traversal is read-only over the graph.

performance_budget.complexity: O(V + E) where V = number of nodes and E = number of edges in the access graph

functions.name: classify_blast
functions.description: Pure classification function. Takes a TraversalResult and SoakParams (for low_trust_threshold) and determines the ActionCategory and legal_flag using max-over-nodes rule. Classification rules per node: PUBLIC-only→AUTO_MERGE, PII→SOAK, FINANCIAL/AUTH→HUMAN_GATE, COMPLIANCE→HUMAN_GATE+legal_flag, unauthorized tier→HUMAN_GATE, LOW_TRUST_AUTHORITATIVE (trust_score < low_trust_threshold and is_authoritative)→HUMAN_GATE. Final action is max over all per-node actions.

inputs.name: traversal
inputs.description: The result of BFS traversal to classify.

inputs.name: soak_params
inputs.description: Soak parameters including low_trust_threshold for LOW_TRUST_AUTHORITATIVE rule.

error_cases.name: empty_traversal
error_cases.condition: traversal.reachable_nodes is empty (should never happen if preconditions hold)

error_data.origin: The origin node of the traversal

preconditions: traversal.reachable_nodes is non-empty (always contains at least origin)
traversal.node_details has one entry per reachable node
postconditions: result.action is the maximum ActionCategory over all per-node classifications
result.legal_flag is True only when result.action == HUMAN_GATE and at least one node has DataTier.COMPLIANCE
result.legal_flag is False when result.action != HUMAN_GATE
result.contributing_nodes is non-empty and contains only nodes whose per-node action equals the final action
If all reachable nodes have DataTier.PUBLIC and are authorized and none are low-trust authoritative, result.action == AUTO_MERGE

structured_side_effects.description: Pure function — no side effects. Classification is a deterministic computation over traversal data.

functions.name: compute_soak_duration
functions.description: Pure function computing soak duration using the formula: soak_duration = base_duration(tier) * (2.0 - trust_score) * max(1.0, sqrt(target_requests / observed_rate_rps)). trust_score is clamped to [0.0, 1.0]. observed_rate_rps is floored to epsilon (1e-9) to prevent division by zero. The result is monotonically non-decreasing as trust_score decreases (FA-A-009) and as (target_requests / observed_rate_rps) increases (FA-A-010).

inputs.name: tier
inputs.description: The data tier to compute soak duration for. Must have a corresponding entry in soak_params.base_durations.

inputs.name: trust_score
inputs.description: Raw trust score in [0.0, 1.0]. Clamped internally if out of range (defensive). Policy calculations use raw value.

inputs.name: soak_params
inputs.description: Soak configuration including base_durations, target_requests, and observed_rate_rps.

error_cases.name: missing_base_duration
error_cases.condition: tier does not have an entry in soak_params.base_durations

error_data.tier: The DataTier that was not found in base_durations

preconditions: tier must have an entry in soak_params.base_durations
postconditions: result is a positive timedelta (> 0 seconds)
result == base_duration(tier) * (2.0 - clamped_trust_score) * max(1.0, sqrt(target_requests / floored_rps))
Monotonically non-decreasing as trust_score decreases for fixed tier, target_requests, observed_rate_rps
Monotonically non-decreasing as (target_requests / observed_rate_rps) increases for fixed tier, trust_score

structured_side_effects.description: Pure function — no side effects. Deterministic arithmetic computation.

functions.name: evaluate_blast
functions.description: Orchestrator function that composes traversal, classification, soak computation, and optional human gate notification into a single BlastResult. Calls compute_blast_radius, then classify_blast, then compute_soak_duration (if action==SOAK), then optionally fires the HumanGateNotifier if action==HUMAN_GATE. This is the primary entry point for blast radius evaluation.

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The access graph to evaluate.

inputs.name: origin
inputs.description: The origin node for blast radius computation.

inputs.name: soak_params
inputs.description: Soak parameters for duration computation and low_trust_threshold.

inputs.name: notifier
inputs.description: Optional HumanGateNotifier protocol implementation. If provided and action is HUMAN_GATE, notify() is called with the BlastResult. None means no notification is sent.

inputs.name: max_depth
inputs.description: Optional maximum BFS depth. None means unbounded.

error_cases.name: origin_not_found
error_cases.condition: origin does not exist in graph.metadata

error_data.node_id: The NodeId that was not found in the graph

error_cases.name: inconsistent_graph
error_cases.condition: A node referenced in adjacency has no corresponding metadata entry

error_data.referenced_by: The NodeId whose adjacency list references the missing node

error_cases.name: missing_base_duration
error_cases.condition: The highest data tier for the blast radius has no entry in soak_params.base_durations (when action==SOAK)

error_data.tier: The DataTier that was not found in base_durations

error_cases.name: notification_failure
error_cases.condition: notifier.notify() raises an exception during HUMAN_GATE notification dispatch

error_data.origin_node: The origin node of the blast result
error_data.underlying_error: String representation of the underlying exception

preconditions: graph must be consistent (all adjacency references have metadata)
soak_params.base_durations must contain entries for all DataTier values
postconditions: result.origin_node == origin
result.computed_at has tzinfo == timezone.utc
result.legal_flag == True implies result.action == HUMAN_GATE
result.soak_duration is not None implies result.action == SOAK
result.soak_duration is None implies result.action != SOAK
result.reachable_nodes contains origin
If action == HUMAN_GATE and notifier is not None, notifier.notify() was called exactly once with the result
If action != HUMAN_GATE or notifier is None, notifier.notify() was not called

structured_side_effects.description: Fires human gate webhook when action == HUMAN_GATE and notifier is provided. The notifier implementation dispatches the actual network call.
Logs blast radius evaluation: origin, reachable count, action, legal_flag, soak_duration, cycle_detected.

performance_budget.complexity: O(V + E) dominated by BFS traversal, plus O(1) for classification and soak computation

functions.name: add_node
functions.description: Adds a node with its metadata to the AccessGraph. Builder pattern method on AccessGraph. If the node already exists, its metadata is replaced.

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The access graph to mutate.

inputs.name: metadata
inputs.description: The metadata for the node to add.

error_cases.name: invalid_metadata
error_cases.condition: metadata fails Pydantic validation (e.g., trust_score out of range)

error_data.node_id: The node_id in the invalid metadata

postconditions: metadata.node_id is in graph.metadata after the call
If metadata.node_id was not previously in graph.adjacency, it is now present with an empty neighbor list
The returned graph is the same object as the input graph (builder pattern)

structured_side_effects.description: Adds or replaces the NodeMetadata entry for the given node_id.
Ensures the node_id has an adjacency entry (initializes empty list if absent).

functions.name: add_edge
functions.description: Adds a directed edge from source to target in the AccessGraph. Builder pattern method. Both source and target must already exist in graph.metadata.

inputs.name: graph
inputs.description: The access graph to mutate.

inputs.name: source
inputs.description: Source node of the directed edge. Must exist in graph.metadata.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: Target node of the directed edge. Must exist in graph.metadata.

error_cases.name: source_not_found
error_cases.condition: source does not exist in graph.metadata

error_data.node_id: The source NodeId that was not found

error_cases.name: target_not_found
error_cases.condition: target does not exist in graph.metadata

error_data.node_id: The target NodeId that was not found

postconditions: target is in graph.adjacency[source]
The returned graph is the same object as the input graph (builder pattern)
No duplicate edges: if target was already in adjacency[source], no change

structured_side_effects.description: Appends target to the adjacency list of source (if not already present).

functions.name: classify_node
functions.description: Pure function that classifies a single node's ActionCategory based on its metadata and the low_trust_threshold. This is the per-node classification building block used by classify_blast. Rules: PUBLIC+authorized+not low_trust_authoritative→AUTO_MERGE, PII+authorized+not low_trust_authoritative→SOAK, FINANCIAL/AUTH→HUMAN_GATE, COMPLIANCE→HUMAN_GATE, unauthorized_tier→HUMAN_GATE, low_trust_authoritative→HUMAN_GATE.

inputs.name: detail
inputs.description: The per-node blast detail to classify.

inputs.name: metadata
inputs.description: Full node metadata including authorized_tiers.

inputs.name: low_trust_threshold
inputs.description: Trust score threshold for LOW_TRUST_AUTHORITATIVE rule.

postconditions: If metadata.data_tier in (FINANCIAL, AUTH, COMPLIANCE), result >= HUMAN_GATE
If metadata.data_tier not in metadata.authorized_tiers, result == HUMAN_GATE
If metadata.is_authoritative and metadata.trust_score < low_trust_threshold, result == HUMAN_GATE
If metadata.data_tier == PUBLIC and authorized and not low_trust_authoritative, result == AUTO_MERGE
If metadata.data_tier == PII and authorized and not low_trust_authoritative, result == SOAK

structured_side_effects.description: Pure function — no side effects. Single-node classification logic.

invariants: trust_score is always in the closed interval [0.0, 1.0] for every NodeMetadata instance
DataTier has a total severity order: PUBLIC < PII < FINANCIAL < AUTH < COMPLIANCE
ActionCategory has a total severity order: AUTO_MERGE < SOAK < HUMAN_GATE
Classification is max over per-node ActionCategory values — the highest severity wins
legal_flag is True if and only if action == HUMAN_GATE and at least one reachable node has DataTier.COMPLIANCE
soak_duration is None when action != SOAK; soak_duration is a positive timedelta when action == SOAK
BFS traversal terminates even on cyclic graphs due to visited-set bounding (rabbit hole patch)
soak_duration is monotonically non-decreasing as trust_score decreases (FA-A-009)
soak_duration is monotonically non-decreasing as (target_requests / observed_rate_rps) increases (FA-A-010)
All datetime fields are UTC (tzinfo == timezone.utc)
The trust ledger is append-only — trust_score values are computed from the ledger, never mutated here
observed_rate_rps is always strictly positive (floored to epsilon = 1e-9 if necessary)
BlastResult.reachable_nodes always includes at least the origin node
AccessGraph adjacency and metadata are consistent: every node in adjacency keys/values exists in metadata
Policy calculations use raw trust_score float, never display tiers
